ddls:
CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_code" INTEGER /* Unique code identifier for each major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "major_category" TEXT /* Category the major belongs to (e.g., Agriculture & Natural Resources) */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Academic level of the major (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, Doctorate) */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of the program in years */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "major_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the major code */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "total_graduates" INTEGER /* Total number of graduates for the major */,
  "employed" INTEGER /* Number of employed graduates */,
  "employed_full_time" INTEGER /* Number of employed graduates working full-time year-round */,
  "part_time_employment" INTEGER /* Number of employed graduates working part-time */,
  "self_employment" INTEGER /* Number of graduates who are self-employed */,
  "unemployed" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed graduates */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the major */,
  "unemployment_duration" REAL /* Average duration of unemployment for unemployed graduates */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income for employed graduates */,
  "p25_income" INTEGER /* 25th percentile income for employed graduates */,
  "p75_income" INTEGER /* 75th percentile income for employed graduates */,
  "industry_sectors" TEXT /* JSON array of industry sectors where graduates are employed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_code", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "major_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the major category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical structure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_major_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES major_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, institution representative) */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the user represents */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "major_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the major being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the salary range entry */,
  "major_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the major code */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the salary data */,
  "industry_sector" TEXT /* Industry sector for the salary range */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the graduates are employed */,
  "median_salary" INTEGER /* Median salary for the major */,
  "p25_salary" INTEGER /* 25th percentile salary for the major */,
  "p75_salary" INTEGER /* 75th percentile salary for the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_ranges_major_code FOREIGN KEY ("major_code") REFERENCES majors ("major_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "unemployment_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the unemployment statistic */,
  "major_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the major code */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the unemployment data */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the graduates are located */,
  "unemployed_count" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed graduates */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the major */,
  "long_term_unemployment_count" INTEGER /* Number of graduates unemployed for more than 6 months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unemployment_statistics_major_code FOREIGN KEY ("major_code") REFERENCES majors ("major_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)
